source: plan/bearings.md § Article hero art — colorful keyboard SVGs
template: directive: news/vendor piece -> keyboard outline / layout silhouette
subject: Top-down F12 TKL keyboard outline silhouette for the CannonKeys Blaine V2: SE group-buy piece. Below the case: three unlabeled glyphs (screw boss / zig-zag gasket strip / open ring) reading the article's triple-mount system (top mount, single-sided gasket, o-ring); a neutral basket-weave band suggesting the carbon-fiber bottom plate; a small cone glyph with concentric glow rings suggesting the POM 'volcano' light-diffusing element on the underside; and four unlabeled dots at varying opacity of the same splash hue representing the Classic / Volcano / Seafoam / Mystery colorways.
brief_summary: Distinct from the companion group-buy card art at /group-buy-art/cannonkeys-blaine-v2-se.svg (which renders the F12 TKL silhouette alone in warm terracotta). This hero art is the article-page treatment: same family F12 TKL silhouette plus three narrative additions unique to the mount-system / material story this article tells, in a distinct muted-terracotta value.
